Awardee: HVAC & INDUSTRIAL MOTOR INC Bayamon PR 00956 USA
Description: March 4, 2026 Post Award Synopsis The Federal Bureau of Prisons, Metropolitan Detention Center (MDC) Guaynabo, Puerto Rico, announces the award of Purchase Order 15B30626P00000063 under Solicitation 15B30626Q0000012 for Project 26Z3AR6 � Repair Motors. The contract has been awarded to HVAC and Industrial Motor for a total amount of $26,131.00. The procurement was conducted under NAICS 238220, utilizing a Firm?Fixed Price contract structure. This acquisition was solicited on an unrestricted basis, and all responsible sources were permitted to submit a quote. In accordance with FAR 4.1102, all offerors were required to be registered in the System for Award Management (SAM) prior to award. Award was made to the offeror whose quote represented the best value to the Government, considering price and past performance. The Government reserved the right to award by item, group, or in aggregate, and exercised this authority in determining the final awardee. Performance under this contract is scheduled to begin on March 9, 2026, at MDC Guaynabo, Highway 28, Intersection of Road 165, Guaynabo, PR 00965?5700. Payments will be made via Electronic Funds Transfer (EFT) or Government Purchase Card, as applicable. Faith?Based and Community?Based Organizations were afforded equal opportunity to compete for this requirement in accordance with federal policy. For additional information regarding this award, the point of contact is Shedaly Martinez?Mass, Supervisory Contract Specialist, reachable at GUA?BusinessOffice?S@bop.gov.
